ON THE WORKBENCH

One practice, three ways in.

Change the studio light. The same work reveals a different edge.

01 / SYSTEMS

Lumi / Hermes

A continuity system for working with AI without losing the thread—or the person.

SELECTED OBJECTS

A NOTE FROM THE DESK

About Billy

He is Director of Technology at Pendleton, a software and product builder, and a designer who came up through labor-union communications.

That history shows up in the work: explain the complicated thing, protect the human stakes, then build a system people can actually use.

The less official version

He likes tiny experiments, strange constraints, well-made tools, and the moment a hard problem finally becomes clear enough to draw.

Billy P.
CURRENTLY

Leading technology.
Building in public.
Still drawing first.
